title: Kodaian
content:
{{Top|leg}}
The '''Kodaians''' were a skittish race from [[Kodai]] who were nearly wiped out during the tidal floods of the [[Planet/Legends|planet's]] giant seas several centuries before [[39 BBY/Legends|39 BBY]]. Most of the survivors fled off planet rather than risk another calamity, and the ones that did remain became fearful of strangers, who they believed could cause disasters.

Every ten years, the Kodaians would go to the beaches of their world to dig up ancient artifacts.

==Appearances==
*''[[Jedi Apprentice Special Edition: The Followers]]'' {{1st}}
